summary: Full backend + frontend testing of the ArtisanMarket MVP. All 26 pytest tests passed (100%): health, seed idempotency, auth (register/login/me/role guards), catalog (categories=6, filters, sort, seller_name), seller CRUD, admin approve/reject/stats, cart+checkout(COD), wishlist, reviews, and AI description (Emergent LLM key returned a real description). UI flows executed via mobile viewport (390x844): customer demo login → home (8 products, 7 category chips horizontally scrollable) → product detail → wishlist toggle → add-to-cart → cart total → checkout with address → order placed and redirected to My Orders (PLACED status visible). Seller demo login → dashboard → add product → AI generate description populated field (~1075 chars) → save → product visible as PENDING in Your Listings. Admin demo login → Pending review queue → Approve button worked and product moved out of queue. No critical bugs found. Minor: React Native web console warning 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' (library-level, non-blocking). server.py is 727 lines — could be split into modules for maintainability.

issues: Some order titles from earlier test data appear truncated (e.g. 'Cow dunck upla') — not a bug in current code, just leftover DB state from prior runs; consider a way to clear TEST_-prefixed data.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Likely emitted from a react-native-web dependency; if any local component passes pointerEvents as a prop, migrate it to style.pointerEvents.

action_items: Optional: split /app/backend/server.py (727 lines) into modules (auth, products, admin, cart, orders, reviews, ai, seed) for future maintainability.
Optional: audit any local usage of pointerEvents prop and migrate to style.pointerEvents to silence the RN web deprecation warning.
Optional: consider a small script/endpoint to purge TEST_-prefixed products/orders between test cycles.
critical_code_review_comments: All API endpoints properly prefixed with /api and use Pydantic validation.
MongoDB _id is consistently excluded via projection {'_id': 0}.
JWT auth is correct with 30-day expiry, bcrypt hashing.
Role guards (require_role) applied on all admin/seller/customer-only endpoints; verified 401/403 behaviour in tests.
Seed endpoint is idempotent (checks user by email and product by title before insert).
AI endpoint uses emergentintegrations LlmChat with openai/gpt-4o-mini as specified.
Frontend uses process.env.EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL correctly; all interactive elements have testID.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all critical flows passed: customer, seller, admin)

seed_data_creation: Used POST /api/seed (idempotent) which seeds 3 demo users + 6 approved products + 1 pending product. All tests reuse seeded demo credentials from /app/memory/test_credentials.md.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend + frontend both fully verified for MVP scope. Seed endpoint is idempotent and safe to call. AI endpoint works with EMERGENT_LLM_KEY. Demo credentials: customer@artisan.market/Customer123!, seller@artisan.market/Seller123!, admin@artisan.market/Admin123!. Frontend uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL. Tests live in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py.
